description: Supabase dashboard - Table Editor (editable data grid with row selection and column management)

components.name: DataGrid
components.description: React Data Grid (RDG) - editable table with virtualized rows, column headers, cell selection, and row selection. Displays ~100 rows with 19 columns showing database records.
components.htmlSample: ...
components.notes: Uses Tailwind CSS grid layout. Frozen column at left for row selection (65px). Supports multi-select, row/column aria roles.

components.name: GridColumnHeader
components.description: Column header cell in table grid. Contains column name, data type, and optional dropdown for column options.
components.htmlSample: uuid
components.notes: Renders database column names with type annotations (uuid, text, timestamp, etc). Clickable for sorting/filtering.

components.name: GridCell
components.description: Data cell in table grid. Contains formatted data values (UUIDs, timestamps, foreign key references).
components.notes: 302+ cells rendered. Foreign key cells show formatted references. Select column shows checkboxes (type="checkbox").

components.name: RowSelectCheckbox
components.description: Checkbox input for row selection in the frozen left column. Also includes 'Select All' checkbox in header.
components.notes: 26 checkboxes total (1 Select All + 25 row selectors visible). Enables row-level operations.

components.name: InsertButton
components.description: Button to insert a new row into the table. Located in grid toolbar area.
props: class contains icon and text span
components.notes: Visible in toolbar above grid. Chevron-down icon. Allows adding new database records.

components.name: SearchInput
components.description: Text input field for searching/filtering tables in the sidebar.
components.htmlSample: <input placeholder="Search tables..." aria-labelledby="Search tables" class="flex border border-control read-only:border-button bg-foreground/[.026] file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-foreground-lighter disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 aria-[invalid=true]:border-destructive-400 aria-[invalid=true]:focus:border-destructive aria-[invalid=true]:focus-visible:border-destructive px-3 py-2 h-[32px] md:h-[28px] text-base md:text-xs pl-7 pr-7 w-full rounded-sm" type="text" value="" name="search-tables">
components.notes: Located in left sidebar. Controlled input with border styling. Used for table discovery/filtering.

components.name: Button
components.description: Generic button component used throughout interface (toolbar buttons, column header buttons, etc.)
components.notes: Multiple button variants throughout page. Many use Radix UI patterns (data-state attribute).

components.name: GridToolbar
components.description: Toolbar above the data grid containing Insert button, Sort controls, and filter options.
components.notes: Coordinates Insert button, Sort dropdown, and other grid controls. Responsive layout (md breakpoint).

components.name: ForeignKeyFormatter
components.description: Special cell formatter for displaying foreign key references with clickable links to related records.
components.notes: Used for UUID/FK columns (tournament_id, home_team_id, away_team_id). Shows formatted reference values.
